Our Story

Built on Trust,
Finished in Perfection

Father & Son · Est. 1999

A Construction Group began with a father's conviction — that the most extraordinary homes deserve the most personal attention. Two generations later, that belief is still the foundation of everything we build.

As a father and son firm, we don't manage from a distance. We're on every job site, in every design meeting, and at every final walkthrough. You work directly with the people whose names are on the line — and whose reputation has been built one home at a time over 25 years.

Our work is defined not by scale alone, but by the relationships we forge — with clients, with designers, and with the architecture itself.

We regularly work with A-list celebrities, high-profile executives, and public figures who require the utmost discretion. Confidentiality is not a policy for us — it is a professional standard we have upheld for over 25 years.

Meet the Team →

What We Build

Full-Spectrum
Luxury Construction

01

New Construction

Ground-up estates built to architectural exactness. We translate the most ambitious visions into enduring structures that define neighborhoods.

02

Luxury Renovation

Complete transformations of existing estates — preserving what matters, elevating everything else to the standard today's luxury demands.

03

Design-Build

Seamless collaboration from concept through completion, working in lockstep with your chosen interior design team for a unified result.

04

Commercial Construction

Premium builds across hospitality, restaurants, retail, and mixed-use developments — the same exacting standard applied to every project.

Selected Projects

Work We're Proud Of

Every project below represents a story we've been trusted to tell. Out of respect for our clients' privacy — many of whom are public figures — we share the work without the names or addresses. The craftsmanship speaks for itself.

Project 01

Trousdale Estates — Phased Luxury Upgrade

A multi-phase renovation of a Trousdale Estates residence, carried out in close collaboration with one of Los Angeles's top interior designers. The phased approach was deliberately chosen to allow the client to experience each transformation before committing to the next — a process that prioritizes trust and satisfaction above speed. The end result is a home that evolved deliberately, and beautifully, at every stage.

Luxury Renovation · Phased Delivery
Project 02

Beverly Park — Full Remodel & 2,000 SF Addition

A 10,000 square foot gut renovation with a 2,000 square foot addition, executed in partnership with two of Los Angeles's most respected interior design firms. No detail was left to chance — from the structural reconfiguration to the final material selections, every decision was made to serve a single vision. The result is a home that feels entirely new while honoring the scale and presence of its original footprint.

Renovation + Addition · Completed
Project 03

West Hollywood — High-Rise Common Area Remodel

A full commercial remodel of all common areas across a 12-story luxury condominium tower in West Hollywood. Scope included a complete lobby redesign, replacement of all corridor doors and hardware, custom wallcoverings throughout, and a fully reimagined outdoor amenity space. The project was executed floor by floor to minimize disruption to residents — a logistical undertaking that required precision scheduling and elite subcontractor coordination.

Commercial · Multi-Story
Project 04

Bel Air — Mediterranean Estate to the Studs

A sweeping 12,500 square foot remodel taken entirely to the studs, currently underway in collaboration with a world-renowned European architect and interior design team. The vision is a one-of-a-kind Mediterranean estate — reimagined from the ground up with all-new landscaping, a resort-style pool, and bespoke finishes sourced from across Europe. Every element of this home is being built to a standard that simply does not exist in the American market.

New Construction · In Progress
Project 05

Canoga Park — 36,000 SF Office & Retail Renovation

A full-scale renovation of a 36,000 square foot commercial office and retail building, encompassing all tenant improvements as well as a complete overhaul of the common areas, building systems, and exterior. The project was delivered on time and positioned the property for immediate lease-up at significantly improved rates — a testament to the role quality construction plays in commercial real estate value.

Commercial · Full TI + Common Areas
Project 06

Beverly Park — 11,200 SF Estate Renovation

An 11,200 square foot whole-home renovation within one of Los Angeles's most prestigious private communities. The project demanded absolute discretion and seamless coordination across multiple trades — delivering a transformed residence that reflects the caliber of living its owners expect, with no compromise in quality or timeline.

Full Renovation · Private Community
Project 07

Studio City — Spanish Bungalow Restoration

A meticulous restoration of a Studio City bungalow, with the singular goal of reviving its original Spanish Colonial character. Original architectural details were carefully preserved or authentically reproduced — arched doorways, hand-troweled plaster walls, terracotta tile, and wrought iron hardware. The result is a home that feels as though it has always looked exactly this way, which is precisely the point.

Historic Restoration · Residential
Project 08

Mt. Olympus — Hillside Remodel in 6 Months

A 4,700 square foot residential remodel completed in just six months — a timeline that required exceptional planning, tight trade coordination, and zero margin for error. The accelerated schedule did not come at the expense of quality; the finished home stands as proof that speed and craftsmanship are not mutually exclusive when the right team is in place.

Residential Remodel · Fast-Track

How We Work

An Elevated Process

Every great residence begins long before ground is broken. Our process ensures nothing is left to chance.

I

Discovery

Understanding your vision, lifestyle, and the legacy you want to build — on your timeline, on your terms.

II

Design Alliance

Deep collaboration with your architects and interior designers to ensure a seamless creative vision.

III

Construction

Masterful execution with uncompromising quality control and complete transparency at every stage.

IV

Delivery

A white-glove handover and ongoing relationship — because your home's journey doesn't end at completion.

Privacy Policy

Last Updated: March 2026

A Construction Group Inc. ("we," "us," or "our") is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your information when you visit our website or contact us through our inquiry form.

Information We Collect

We collect information you voluntarily provide when submitting an inquiry, including your name, email address, phone number, and project details. We do not collect any information automatically beyond standard web server logs.

How We Use Your Information

Your information is used solely to respond to your project inquiry and communicate with you about potential construction services. We do not use your data for marketing purposes, and we do not sell, trade, or transfer your personal information to third parties under any circumstances.

Confidentiality

We understand that many of our clients are public figures, executives, or individuals who require the highest level of discretion. All inquiries and project details shared with A Construction Group Inc. are treated as strictly confidential. Our team members are bound by confidentiality obligations and do not discuss client projects, locations, or personal information with any third party without express written consent.

Data Storage & Security

Form submissions are processed through Formspree, a secure third-party form service. Data is transmitted using SSL encryption. We retain inquiry information only as long as necessary to evaluate and respond to your project request, and we do not store sensitive personal data beyond what is needed for project communication.

Third-Party Services

Our website is hosted on Vercel. Form submissions are handled by Formspree. These services have their own privacy policies governing the processing of data on their platforms. We do not share your personal information with these providers beyond what is technically required to deliver the service.

Cookies

This website does not use tracking cookies, advertising cookies, or any third-party analytics tools. We do not track your behavior across other websites.

Your Rights

You have the right to request access to, correction of, or deletion of any personal information we hold about you. To make such a request, please contact us at [email protected]. We will respond within 30 days.

Contact

If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at:
A Construction Group Inc.
Serving Los Angeles
